title: U.S. has violated ceasefire agreement, Iran parliamentary speaker says
summary_full: The two-week ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran appeared at risk of unraveling less than a day after it was announced.
summary_public: The two-week ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran appeared at risk of unraveling less than a day after it was announced.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. has violated ceasefire agreement, Iran parliamentary speaker says
